title: COUNSELING PROGRAM - 211info
text: LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES ADMIN OFFICE COUNSELING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers outpatient mental health treatment. Therapists can address a range of mental, emotional, behavioral, and situational issues, including family conflict, physical and sexual abuse, trauma, grief, adjustment problems, co-occurring disorders, ADD/ADHD, school problems, domestic violence, sexual acting out, socialization problems, self-destructive behaviors, depression, anxiety/stress, anger management, self-esteem issues, relationship problems, and emotional problems. 1790 W 11th Avenue Suite 200 Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted; varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 484-4428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 686-2688 Main phone (541) 689-3111 Crisis Hotline (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD Intake (541) 484-4428 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus stop on 11th Avenue, just off Chambers Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Abuse Counseling Child Sexual Abuse Counseling Crime Victim/Witness Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Sexual Assault Counseling Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - CENTER POINT SCHOOL FOOD - RESOURCE PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES ADMIN OFFICE
